children.text: Access all kinds of information from HOME!
Do you have a premium code?
Using TRAVEL JAPAN Wi-Fi is more convenient if you have a premium code!
Click here to redeem a Premium Code

プロフィール登録を行うと、
こんなことができるようになります！
A premium code is a special code that lets you instantly increase the number of spots where you can connect to Wi-Fi.
If you register a premium code on your device, you will be able to use Wi-Fi at more than 200,000 locations in Japan.
Register the code on your device!
After getting a premium code, please register your premium code through Settings.
You can check this guide through Settings at any time.
